rechargeAmountUsd.description: Optional pay-as-you-go auto top-up ceiling, in USD. If set, usage above the plan's included quota is billed via the shared payment token: your prepaid balance is refilled to this amount whenever it runs low. If unset, the plan's included quota is a hard cap (the service stops once depleted). Minimum $15. To disable a previously enabled auto top-up, send `{ "rechargeAmountUsd": null }` via update_service. See https://huggingface.co/pricing for current rates.
